text.title: Codemod-First Refactor Agent Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: scope-and-pick-tool
step.action: Identify language + site count; pick AST tool. If < 5 sites, STOP.

step.name: author-codemod
step.action: Author transform; dry-run on 5 sample files; verify diff.

step.name: apply-in-batches
step.action: Apply in batches; run focused tests after each.

step.name: open-pr-with-reviewer
step.action: transform-author opens PR with codemod + samples + counts; reviewer agent reviews.
